## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Motivation / Use Case

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve? Who benefits from it?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you imagine this feature would work. Include code examples if helpful.

```php
// Example usage
```

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds?

## Additional Context

Any other context, references, or examples from other frameworks.
